web_data.description: A health-tech startup focused on managing and reversing Type 2 diabetes and pre-diabetes through a data-driven approach combining continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) technology, personalized coaching, and lifestyle interventions.
web_data.target_audience: Individuals diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes, people with pre-diabetes, and those seeking to improve metabolic health or manage blood sugar levels.

web_data.description: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) is an Indian central public sector undertaking under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas. It is one of India's leading oil and gas companies, engaged in refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products, and has integrated digital payment systems including QR-code based transactions across its retail outlets.
products_services: Refining and Marketing of Petroleum Products
web_data.target_audience: Individual vehicle owners, households, industrial enterprises, and aviation companies
